description_long: This house is a large, detached residential building surrounded by a dense hedge that forms a rectangular boundary, enclosing a spacious yard and driveway. The structure features a complex, multi-gabled roof with dark gray shingles and several protruding sections, including a main entrance with a covered porch and decorative stonework. The property includes a paved driveway leading to a garage, as well as a mix of paved and wooden deck areas in the backyard, which also contains outdoor furniture and a small utility structure. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with a combination of standard rectangular panes and larger, multi-pane sections. The landscaping includes several trees and shrubs, both inside and outside the hedge, contributing to a suburban, well-maintained appearance. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern suburban architectural elements, with a focus on comfort, privacy, and outdoor living space.
description: A large, multi-gabled suburban house with a stone-accented entry, surrounded by a dense hedge and landscaped yard, featuring a driveway, garage, and backyard deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the hedge-enclosed backyard with visible outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard deck, utility structure, and the full extent of the hedge boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the house, additional roof details, and the continuation of the driveway and hedge.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some larger multi-pane sections
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with stone accents, steps, and decorative shrubbery
